Get endpoints

Source: R/get-fields.R
get_endpoints.Rd

This function reminds the user what the 7 possible PatentsView API endpoints are.

get_endpoints()

Value

A character vector with the names of the 7 endpoints. Those endpoints are:

  • assignees

  • cpc_subsections

  • inventors

  • locations

  • nber_subcategories

  • patents

  • uspc_mainclasses

Examples

get_endpoints()
#> [1] "assignees"          "cpc_subsections"    "inventors"         
#> [4] "locations"          "nber_subcategories" "patents"           
#> [7] "uspc_mainclasses"
